title: 姐御の生き様ここにあり

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon's remarkable resilience during the Battle of the Dorms
sticks in my mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curious how her running ability compares, I make my way to the track
in hopes of observing her performance during training.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, lookin' good! But I know you've got more where that came
from!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You mentioned before about a rival you wanna defeat, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Then let that fire inside you burn even brighter!

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am! Will do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I arrive to see her training alongside one of the younger students.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Good, then it's time for another lap! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amazon's footwork is dynamic and powerful as she speeds around the
track.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Go, go, gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although her positioning leaves something to be desired, she
manages to seize the lead by sheer force of will.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find myself drawn to her fearless style of running, which seems to be
a direct reflection of her personality itself.

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, Hishiama! I can't wait to train with you again!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You bet! Must be dog-tired, huh? Make sure to eat a good meal, and
take a nice, hot bath afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Miho Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am! See you next time!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Careful, now! Don't want any tumbles!
Heh... Her expression's really toughened up.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, it won't be long before she turns into a formidable rival in
her own right!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Who're you?
Oh, a badge. So you're a trainer at the school?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: And I don't just sound like it—I am having fun! There's nothin' better than seeing the youngsters get stronger right before my eyes!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
After all, that just means I'll have my pick of opponents to race
one-on-one!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hoo boy, this is exactly why Tracen Academy is the best! There are super strong Umamusume everywhere you look!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And I'm gonna take 'em all on and get even stronger myself! I'll go
one-on-one against everyone in the Twinkle Series if I have to!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: That's just how I roll!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her words, Amazon spends her days competing against
practically every Umamusume she crosses paths with.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Time for a one-on-one, Fuji! This time, let's see who can hold their
breath longer underwater!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, that sounds like a rather risky endeavor... Hey, I know! What
say we include a rule that you're allowed to make your opponent
laugh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You little trickster... But sure, I'm cool with it! You know me—I never
shy away from a challenge!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough! Huff, puff... Damn you, Fuji! Resorting to tickling? That's playin' dirty!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Your sides are too easy a target to resist.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hold up, Biko. Think you could repeat that?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I said—let's have a hero pose showdown, Hishiama! We'll see which of
us is more like an ally of justice!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Not sure I get it, but if we're talkin' a one-on-one, then I'm all
in!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Like this? Hup! Hngh! Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whew... Oh, fancy seeing you again.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, tryouts are just around the corner. I can't be lazing around when
my big debut's on the line.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I gotta show off my skills during the race and get myself a trainer with
a fiery spirit!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Like I said before, it's not enough going one-on-one with students
here at the school. I gotta throw down with the Twinkle Series crowd
too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Well, can you blame me at a school like this?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But I guess I kinda get it from my mom too.
choice_data_list: Did your mother used to race?
Did your mother used to race?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sure did! She only ever competed overseas though. Yep, that's
right—you wouldn't know it, but I used to live abroad too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
My mom was pretty big over there, I'll have you know. I really looked
up to her—that's part of what got me into racing.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But the first time I experienced a race firsthand was when I came to
Japan to watch the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll never forget the thrill of watching those crazy speed demons
battle it out!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I was all, "Whoa, awesome! Lemme at 'em! I wanna go one-on-one with those badasses!" And I leapt right out of my seat!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Nah, my mom grabbed me by the scruff of the neck and sat me
right back down.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Boy, was she pissed. It's fun thinking back on the race and all, but I'd rather not remember that part.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the excitement and longing for the world of competition that
she felt back then made Amazon who she is today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, what's this? Didja fall prey to my wily charms just now, hmm?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But I've got bad news for ya! I'm not gonna let myself be scouted 'til
after tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: There's no rule against it or anything, but that's what I've decided. I want you and the other trainers to witness what I can do in a real race.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Mark my words—you're gonna see somethin' real special!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What sort of running will this go-getter show us at tryouts? I can't wait
to find out.
